title: RelBench rel-hm (H&M Fashion) Dataset: Tables, FK Links, Cardinality Stats & Parent-Child Feature Pairs
summary: Demo notebook exploring the RelBench rel-hm (H&M Fashion) relational dataset. Loads pre-extracted FK link data (transaction→customer and transaction→article) containing cardinality statistics and aligned parent-child feature pairs. The notebook parses FK metadata, builds aligned DataFrames from sampled pairs, computes cross-table feature correlations, and visualizes cardinality histograms and correlation heatmaps. Uses 50 sampled pairs per FK link from the mini dataset (2 examples total). All categorical columns are label-encoded and dates are epoch seconds.
